// GOOD: benchmark docs clearly separate debug vs release numbers
// README.md:
// "Release performance: 100MB in 0.8s (cargo bench --release)"
// "Debug build with assertions: 100MB in 2.3s (cargo bench, debug_assertions=on)"
// "All published numbers are from release builds unless noted"

fn parse_document(input: &str) -> Document {
    debug_assert!(!input.is_empty());
    debug_assert!(input.len() < MAX_SIZE);

    let mut parser = Parser::new(input);
    parser.parse()
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod benches {
    use super::*;
    use test::Bencher;

    #[bench]
    fn bench_parse_small(b: &mut Bencher) {
        let input = "sample document content";
        b.iter(|| parse_document(input));
    }
}
